title: Airwaves: A Combinatorial Spectrum Auction
strategies: arrival-order greedy (weak reference): accept packages in submission order, skipping any that collide on a licence or repeat a carrier; reproduces the evaluator's w_base anchor (~0.10)
value / density greedy: reorder packages by value or value-per-licence so efficient bundles outrank one huge blocking bid; a large jump over arrival order but never revisits its choices

multi-key greedy + 1-for-many-swap local search: seed from several orderings (value, density, sqrt-density, small-first), then repeatedly drop the winners a package collides with and adopt it whenever welfare strictly rises; approaches the strong internal anchor (~0.80)
toward-optimal winner determination: branch-and-bound / ILP / stronger metaheuristics on the NP-hard combinatorial-auction WDP push past the internal local-search reference toward 1.0
infeasible: awarding every bid (overlapping licences + multiple XOR packages per carrier) is rejected and scores 0.0
